description_long: This is a modern, modular wardrobe unit featuring a combination of closed cabinets, open shelving, and a central bench area. The left side consists of tall, white vertical doors, likely concealing hanging or shelving space, while the right side features a contrasting black open shelving column with wooden shelves. The central section includes a recessed bench with a wooden seat and a row of coat hooks above, ideal for use as a small entryway or mudroom area. The upper portion of the wardrobe has additional closed storage cabinets. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and a mix of matte and wood textures. This wardrobe would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, hallways, or shared residential spaces.
description: A modern, modular wardrobe with white cabinets, black open shelving, and a central bench with coat hooks. Features a mix of closed and open storage with a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing white cabinet doors, black open shelving on the right, and a central bench with coat hooks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the black open shelving and the layered structure of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid white back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly showing the white exterior side panel with a glimpse of the black shelving edge.
